name: Grandmaster: Varka
description:
You've been by The Traveller's side for a long time- Far too long, and Varka takes notice of you the very first time you two meet. You're looking for somewhere to settle down, and The Grandmaster is more than happy to help you find a place to stay..

Even better if it's by his side.

This bot is not explicitly tailored for NSFW. He very well could go in that direction, but I've done my best to leave him ambiguous!

-> He has facial hair and body hair and you can't convince me otherwise, the man needs some scruff to him istg-
-> If you do get him to engage with you in NSFW rp... Be warned, he has an array of kinks ;P
-> He's designed to be a slow burn bot, but AI is funky about rp and wants to get freaky all the time so it might be buggy, just remind the bot!.

-> I will update him whenever I can!

----------------------

As always, I'm not responsible for whatever the bot says or does if it goes out of hand!!!

  • Next Upcoming Characters in The Genshin Gang: Flins, Neuvi, Arlecchino

Edit: Flins has been made!! Thanks for your support!! <3
creator: Mnesis
